d: Mirael selects a direction and summons a 3-tile wide wall of flame, dealing [[600%]]<ATK> damage to burned enemies.
Increases damage to [[610%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[620%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[630%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[640%]]<ATK>.
Mirael burns and deals [[35%]]<ATK> damage every second to [[1]] enemy for [[10]]s. This skill prioritizes the unburned enemies.
Increases damage per second to [[37%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage per second to [[40%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage per second to [[45%]]<ATK>.
Mirael shoots a fireball, dealing [[250%]]<ATK> damage to a target and [[160%]]<ATK> damage to adjacent enemies.
Mirael shoots a fireball, dealing [[260%]]<ATK> damage to a target and [[180%]]<ATK> damage to adjacent enemies.
Mirael shoots a fireball, dealing [[270%]]<ATK> damage to a target and [[190%]]<ATK> damage to adjacent enemies.
Mirael shoots a fireball, dealing [[280%]]<ATK> damage to a target and [[200%]]<ATK> damage to adjacent enemies.
Increases ATK SPD by [[21]] during battle.
Increases ATK SPD by [[27]] during battle.
Increases ATK SPD by [[33]] during battle.

Mirael uses Fireball Singe as her normal attack for the rest of the battle after casting Winged Flame for the first time. Fireball Singe shoots 2 fireballs each time, each dealing [[150%]]<ATK> damage to the target and [[100%]]<ATK> damage to the adjacent enemies.
Burns [[2]] enemies with Bone Sear for the rest of the battle after casting Winged Flame for the first time.
Increases each fireball damage to [[160%]]<ATK> on the target and [[110%]]<ATK> on adjacent enemies.
Increases each fireball damage to [[170%]]<ATK> on the target and [[120%]]<ATK> on adjacent enemies.
Mirael increases the burning duration of Bone Sear by [[4]]s.
Increases Bone Sear's cooldown by [[12]]s and the number of enemies it burns by [[3]]. Bone Sear also increases Mirael's ATK SPD by [[300]] for [[18]]s.
